title: Craftable Cobwebs
description: This mod is a Qol mod here to help you get cobwebs fast with string
body: This mod is a Qol Mod here you help you get Cobwebs whether it be for farms pvp or anything of the sorts this mod is here to help you this is a 1.21.8 mod and will be updated eventually in the future i hope you like and enjoy this mod
